title: dodonaea stenophylla
intro: Dodonaea stenophylla, also known as the native hop bush, is a shrub native to Australia and a member of the Sapindaceae family. Traditionally used in Australian Aboriginal medicine, this plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Dodonaea stenophylla include its potential to alleviate pain, reduce inflammation, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Dodonaea stenophylla can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
